'''Cid Rushing''', whose [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] and children were captured by [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] forces, was one of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka's]] [[Security Officer]]s during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. A [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]] in the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]], Rushing was charged with the protection of [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala's]] Throne Room, and was among the security personnel who participated in the resistance to the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]].

==Behind the scenes==
Rushing was portrayed by [[Roman Coppola]] in [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].<ref>{{Twitter|pabl0hidalgo|status/1485312664351883264|[[Pablo Hidalgo]]|quote=Friend of the family Roman Coppola playing this Naboo security guard.|date=2022-01-23|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/GWrQs}}</ref> His first name was based on a [[W:c:FinalFantasy:Cid|recurring character name]] in the Japanese role-playing game franchise [[Wikipedia:Final Fantasy (series)|''Final Fantasy'']], as a response to the ''Final Fantasy'' franchise naming several of their characters after characters from ''Star Wars'' (in particular, the characters [[W:c:FinalFantasy:Biggs and Wedge|Biggs and Wedge]], who were named after [[Biggs Darklighter|Biggs]] [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Darklighter]] and [[Wedge Antilles|Wedge]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Antilles]], respectively).<ref name="FBNF1">{{Facebook|username=star-wars-sourcebooks|url=notes/star-wars-sourcebooks/creating-naming-the-naboos-finest-rogues-gallery-star-wars-insider-145/630688876981223|name=Star Wars Sourcebooks|date=Oct 22, 2013|archivedate=20200412203331}}</ref>
